Steps: - Navigate to the Properties section from the left sidebar
Expected Results:
- Properties page should load
- Page title 'Properties' is displayed
- Breadcrumb shows: Dashboard • Properties • List

Steps: - Click the '+ New Property' button on the top right
Expected Results: - A new property creation form/modal should open

Steps: - Type a property name or address in the Search field
Expected Results:
- Results should filter to show only matching properties
- Non-matching properties should be hidden

Steps: - Type a string that matches no property (e.g. 'XYZABC') in Search field
Expected Results:
- No property cards should be shown
-  An empty state or 'No results' message should appear

Steps: - Clear the search field or leave it empty
Expected Results: - All available properties should be displayed

Steps:
- Open the 'Sort By' dropdown
- Select 'Most Recent'
Expected Results: - Properties should be sorted with the most recently added/modified first

Steps:
- Open the 'Sort By' dropdown
- Select each available option one by one
Expected Results: - Property list should re-order accordingly for each selection
- Property cards should display in a compact/condensed layout

Steps:
- Open the 'Density' dropdown
- Select other available density options
Expected Results: - Card layout should change to reflect the selected density

Steps:
- Open the 'Type' dropdown
- Select a specific property type (e.g. 'Apartment Complex')
Expected Results: - Only properties matching that type should be shown

- All properties should be displayed regardless of type
- Count shown as 'All (1)' or matching total

- Card should show:
• Property image
• Type tag (Apartment Complex)
• Property name
• Address (truncated if long)
• Photo count
• RFP count
- Should navigate to the property detail page

Steps: - Observe the property card that shows 'No photos'
Expected Results: - A placeholder or default image should display
